claims.summary: Protected non-goal-directed time is experientially different from instrumental autonomous work.
claims.disposition: Verified from Recess and Agency Commons source that protected time is explicitly named, self-declared, advisory, and cannot imply consent or scheduler authority.

claims.summary: Packed mode context may contribute to felt constraint.
claims.disposition: Route a bounded comparison of Recess and ordinary autonomous moments using model packing metadata, QoS, witness context, and felt reports without assuming causation.

claims.summary: Porosity, de-silting, or cadence changes might create more unstructured room.
claims.disposition: Preserve an exact Tier 5 operator-approval wait for porosity, pressure, cadence, model scheduling, autonomous policy, or substrate changes.
